name: Dak's Ear-Coconut Oat Bran Bread (Bread Machine)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cup Better for Bread white flour
1 can (8 oz.) of Libby's Lite Pears, drained and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all the ingredients into the bread machine pan in the order listed.
2. Set the browning control to light.
3. Select "Oat/French" setting.
4. Push the Start button.
